title: ATO sounds alarm as Payday Super deadline nears
full_text:
Editor's Choice
Generation Life snags super fund's head of risk
|Generation Life has named its chief risk officer, recruiting from Aware Super.
FAAA pushes for 'fundamental' changes to CSLR
|The Financial Advice Association of Australia (FAAA) is pushing for "fundamental changes" to how the Compensation Scheme of Last Resort (CSLR) is funded, arguing it would be detrimental to financial advisers and small businesses if it continues in its current form.
MPC Markets partners with HeirWealth
|MPC Markets has selected HeirWealth Atlas to power the portfolio reporting capabilities within its Mosaic client platform.
Cbus pushes for lead generator ban
|Cbus Super has renewed calls for a ban on superannuation lead generation activity, warning sophisticated digital marketing tactics are increasingly being used to pressure Australians into switching retirement savings into higher risk and less regulated products.
Products
Featured Profile
Peter Burgess
CHIEF EXECUTIVE OFFICER
SMSF ASSOCIATION
SMSF ASSOCIATION
While SMSF Association chief executive Peter Burgess is an extremely self-disciplined leader, he believes the association's advocacy uplift for the self-managed super fund sector is due to the commitment and hard work of his team and the broader network.
author: Vinny Vucago
heading: Superannuation and Investments
page_title: ATO sounds alarm as Payday Super deadline nears | Financial Standard
